return(function(l,z,M,V,B,E,O,f,t,X,y,k,I,m,c,Z,C,N,s,r,w,H,n,R)c,I,C,m,w,H,t,Z,X,k,s,n,f,r,N,R,y=function(l,A)local z=w(A)local M=function(M,V,B,E,O,m,y)return R(l,{M,V,B;E,O;m;y},A,z)end return M
